_meta.notes: Source of truth for schema provisioning. The executing session reads this and drives the Dataverse-skills plugin (dv-metadata, solution='HITLSkillUpdate') + PAC CLI. See docs/build-plan.md for the full sequence. Option-set integer values use the publisher choice-value base 720670000.

domains.name: Document Intake
domains.description: Upload documents, store the source file and variable extracted JSON, randomly tag a configurable share for human-in-the-loop review, and work the review loop. The app does not process/extract documents — an external Power Automate flow + Agent does.

optionSets.description: Lifecycle that drives the external Power Automate / Agent handoff.

options.label: Uploaded
options.description: Created in the app; file stored; not yet queued.

options.label: Queued
options.description: App set this on submit. The external flow watches for this value.

options.label: Processing
options.description: Agent is extracting; set by the flow.

options.label: Processed
options.description: Extracted Data + Document Type written back by the Agent.

options.label: Failed
options.description: Extraction failed; Processing Error populated. May be re-queued.

options.label: Not Required
options.description: Random Draw did not match Trigger Value.

options.label: Pending Review
options.description: Flagged and waiting for a reviewer.

optionSets.description: Processing lifecycle of a Skill Update Request — a reviewer's suggested improvement to the agent skill, raised when a Document is rejected.

options.label: New
options.description: Raised by a reviewer on rejection; not yet triaged.

options.label: In Progress
options.description: A skill owner is implementing the suggested fix.

options.label: Completed
options.description: The suggested fix has been applied to the agent skill.

tables.description: An uploaded document (receipt, invoice, etc.) with its source file, extracted JSON, processing status, random review draw, and review state.

primaryName.description: Display name for the document; defaults to the uploaded file name.

columns.description: Friendly, system-generated unique identifier (e.g. DOC-2026-00001). Immutable; assigned by Dataverse on create. Downstream agents reference the record by this value.
The original uploaded binary (PDF/JPG/PNG). Rendered back to the user on the record. Cap ~32MB; File columns support up to ~128MB if needed.
Set by the Agent after classification; empty at upload.
App sets Queued on submit; external flow advances the rest.
Variable JSON written by the Agent and edited by reviewers via generated controls. Never shown as raw JSON in the UI.
The integer the app drew at record creation. Captured for transparency/audit.
True when Random Draw Value equals the configured Trigger Value.
Review loop state. Set to Pending Review when flagged; otherwise Not Required.
Reviewer's note; required on Reject (enforced client-side).
Populated by the flow when Processing Status = Failed.
When the Agent finished processing.
When a reviewer approved/rejected.

tables.description: Admin-managed catalog of document categories (Receipt, Invoice, ...). Extensible without a code change.

primaryName.description: Display name of the document type (e.g. Receipt, Invoice).

columns.description: Optional human-readable description / hint for the Agent.
Whether this type is selectable / in use.

tables.description: Single-row configuration for the random review draw. Edited by an Admin in-app at runtime.

columns.description: Inclusive lower bound of the random draw range.
Inclusive upper bound of the random draw range (e.g. 20).
When a Document's Random Draw equals this, it is flagged for review (e.g. 7). Must fall within [Range Min, Range Max].

tables.description: A reviewer's suggested improvement to the agent skill, raised when a Document is rejected. Captures what should change in the underlying agent skill and tracks its processing status.

primaryName.description: Display name; defaults to 'Skill update for <document name>'.

columns.description: The rejected Document that triggered this skill-update request.
Denormalized Document Type name captured at request time, for grouping/reporting without a second lookup.
The reviewer's description of what should be improved in the underlying agent skill (entered in the rejection dialog).
Processing lifecycle: New -> In Progress -> Completed / Dismissed.
When the reviewer raised the request (on rejection).
When the request reached Completed or Dismissed.

securityRoles.name: Document Intake Uploader
securityRoles.description: Creates documents and sees their own; read-only on Review Settings and Document Types.
securityRoles.privileges: Create/Read/Write own Document; Read Document Type; Read Review Settings.

securityRoles.name: Document Intake Reviewer
securityRoles.description: Works the review queue: read all Documents, edit Extracted Data / Review fields, approve/reject, and raise Skill Update Requests.
securityRoles.privileges: Read/Write Document (org or BU depth per Dataverse security modeling); Create/Read/Write Skill Update Request; Read Document Type; Read Review Settings.

securityRoles.name: Document Intake Admin
securityRoles.description: Full control plus manages Document Types, Review Settings, and Skill Update Requests.
securityRoles.privileges: Full Document; Create/Read/Write/Delete Document Type, Review Settings, and Skill Update Request.

provisioningPlansJson.purpose: Create or update tables, columns, and option sets after review
Apply the Document -> Document Type lookup relationship after table provisioning
Register Dataverse tables with pac code add-data-source and regenerate the SDK

orgStructure._note: Intentionally empty. Decision: all tables User/Team owned, no organization-owned tables. Authorization and data scope are delegated entirely to Dataverse security-role modeling (see securityRoles). Do NOT custom-model business units, owner teams, or Entra groups for this app.
